chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Present: Irshad Ali Shah, J. Agha Faisal, J. CP D327 of 2018: Abdul Hussain Abro vs. Taluka Municipal Administration Dokri & others For the Petitioner: Mr. Abdul Rasheed Soomro, Advocate For the Respondents: Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Addl. A.G Dates of hearing: 08.03.2022. Date of announcement: 08.03.2022. ORDER Agha Faisal, J. This petition, filed in 2018, seeks release of salary from 2013 till date. The petitioner has relied upon documentation demonstrating that his appointment was for an initial preliminary period of one year and no documentation has been placed on record to demonstrate that post completion of that year the services had been continued. It is seen from the record that the petitioner does not claim any salary for the period covered under the aforementioned appointment order, hence, it is prima facie apparent that salary is being claimed for the period in respect whereof no subsisting tenancy or appointment had been demonstrated. Even otherwise this petition is severely hit by laches. In view hereof this petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE
